product.title: L'Oreal Paris Makeup Infallible Up to 24HR Pro-Glow Foundation, Buff Beige, 1 fl oz.
featureBullets: Infallible Pro Glow Foundation With Spf: Lightweight and creamy, this long lasting medium-coverage foundation goes on smooth and finishes with a glow that lasts, The hydrating foundation with SPF is ideal for normal to dry skin

Infallible Face Makeup: Everything from the Infallible foundations, contour kits, and powders are professionally formulated for an expert look that lasts for hours on end, so you get color, definition and coverage that lasts

The Foundation Of Your Look: From BB creams to blush, L'Oréal has everything you need for a smooth, even finish, Highlight to illuminate your look, use concealer to hide imperfections or apply contouring makeup for enhanced, defined features

Because You're Worth It: L'Oréal Paris helps you create the look you want with our full line of makeup including foundations, concealers, highlighter makeup, eyeshadow palettes, lipsticks and much more
Perfect To Pair With: Try with our Infallible Pro Glow Face Primer to prepare, perfect and illuminate while it hydrates skin for better makeup application
product.description: Discover the new pro finish of longwear: up to 24 hour wear with a hydrating glow. Lightweight and creamy, L’Oral Paris' Infallible Pro Glow Foundation is a long lasting foundation that goes on smooth with a glow finish that lasts. Hydrating foundation has medium coverage and instantly hides imperfections for a clear complexion. This luminous foundation with SPF is ideal for normal to dry skin. Up to 24HR Foundation Hydrating Glow, Medium Coverage Healthy, Radiant Finish The New Pro-Look of Longwear Apply to cheeks, forehead, and chin blending outward. Finish with Infallible Pro-Spray and Set for a lasting glow look. Octinoxate 3.01% Warnings. For external use only. Do not use on damaged or broken skin. When using this product keep out of eyes. Rinse with water to remove. Stop use and ask a doctor if rash occurs. Keep out of reach of children. If swallowed, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away.
product.returns: Non-returnable. Transportation of this item is subject to hazardous materials regulation

specification.value: #49,824 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #420 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation effective, with one noting it's great for everyday wear. They appreciate its coverage, with one mentioning it's buildable for medium coverage, and its perfect shade. The foundation blends nicely and provides a natural, pretty finish, while being lightweight and creamy without being too oily.

reviews.reviewText: I love this make-up, light weight foundation, non-cakey, good coverage. It is a natural looking finish and great for older ladies like myself. It is not always easy to find the right shade with “drug store” cosmetics but Bluff Beige is perfect for me.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 27, 2024
Reviewed in the United States on December 17, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This was hard to find in stores. Was thrilled when I found it on Amazon. Perfect shade for me, wears well, lasts all day. Not oily, not matte however I do moisturize before I apply it. It doesn’t look like it but the bottle lasts a long time.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on April 22, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: It’s a great summer everyday foundation.
reviews.reviewText: I bought this for my “tan” season. Great for light coverage daytime wear. Not covering. More like a BB cream but I like my freckles to show so it’s a win for me. Does not last the day though.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on September 5, 2022

reviews.reviewText: Amazon description says "classic tan" but it says 206/Buff Beige on the bottle - which is what I wanted. Item had safety seal intact and the product is authentic. L'oreal foundations rival department store as they're so blendable and have versatile coverage. Love this for adding some color while I wait for summer! I use a beauty blender for a light application and you can build it up. Also applies well with a foundation brush. Can be set with a loose or compact powder. I don't need to touch it up all day long!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on April 8, 2023

reviews.reviewTitle: Very sheer for older skin, and that's a good thing!
reviews.reviewText: I'm over 70, so wanted to get away from the matte foundations and dry powder and blush. This goes very well with my tinted moisturizer, and while sheer, does cover up a lot of my blotchy skin. I still use concealer on spots, but the overall look is a nice glow! I use a bit of shimmery lipstick for some color in my cheeks and it's a whole new look! I would recommed this foundation for its coverage and sheer, creamy feel. Good product!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 29, 2022

reviews.reviewTitle: Good, but takes time to blend
reviews.reviewText: Good buildable medium coverage, but didn’t like the the little white dots the SPF made on my skin.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 9, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Get it now! You won’t be disappointed! Xx
reviews.reviewText: Absolutely love this product! I have had compliments on my make up since I started using it. It’s quite runny but I think that’s part of it allowing for hydration and glow. It applies easily. And you can build for more coverage. I love it. Very happy with my purchase. I have much more expensive foundations and they don’t achieve the effect that this one does 👍🏽
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on November 4, 2018

reviews.reviewText: Well I was a bit dubious but the reviews all leading to a quality product. The product isn’t boxed and the tube does seem a little small but it goes a long way. Colour is great for covering red outbreaks and blemishes. Lovely glow without the use of primer or a base illuminator. Will purchase again
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on December 14, 2018

reviews.reviewText: I’m not sure if I got a damaged product, but this foundation is very patchy and is leaving white dots on my face even though I mixed it up well before using.very disappointed
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on September 20, 2018

reviews.reviewText: Good coverage and feels very light on the skin . Doesn’t leave my skin dry
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on September 5, 2018
Reviewed in the United Kingdom on February 25, 2021
